_status_line: Locked competitor contrast as lead angle · adopted Scout HIGH-confidence spec hook · decided REEL format · briefed Copy for precision contrast.

website_truth.verified_disclaimer: Not affiliated with, endorsed by, or sponsored by Swatch Group Ltd or Audemars Piguet.

primary_angle.title: 40.35mm. 0.7mm. 22mm. Competitors miss this.
primary_angle.core_message: Cradle Adapter V1 is engineered for Royal Pop’s exact 40.35mm socket, 0.7mm retaining lip, and 22mm lug width. Competitors use generic adapters that compromise fit, finish, and safety. This is the only adapter designed for the Royal Pop, not a strap.
primary_angle.why_this_wins: Competitor launches are flooding the market with generic adapters. Cradle Adapter V1’s engineering precision (40.35mm, 0.7mm, 22mm) differentiates it as the premium solution, addressing audience tension around fit and safety.
primary_angle.audience: Royal Pop owners and watch enthusiasts who prioritize engineering precision and are skeptical of generic adapters.
primary_angle.desired_reaction: Acknowledgment of Cradle Adapter V1’s superior fit and engineering. Urgency to join the waitlist before competitors saturate the market with inferior products.

supporting_angle.title: Royal Pop on wrist: The adapter race is on.
supporting_angle.purpose: Highlight the viral demand for wrist conversion and position Cradle Adapter V1 as the premium alternative to generic competitors. Addresses the tension between scarcity and accessibility by framing the waitlist as exclusive access to engineering-led design.

content_decision.goal: Contrast Cradle Adapter V1’s engineering precision with generic competitor adapters. Use slow-motion shots to highlight 40.35mm socket, 0.7mm lip, and 22mm lug width. End with a side-by-side comparison of Cradle Adapter V1 and a competitor’s adapter on a Royal Pop.
content_decision.conversion_role: Drive waitlist sign-ups by emphasizing Cradle Adapter V1’s superior fit and scarcity.

creative_direction.tone: Premium, direct, slightly obsessive about fit and finish.
creative_direction.pace: Calm, deliberate, with moments of slow-motion precision.
creative_direction.visual_energy: High contrast between Cradle Adapter V1’s engineering detail and generic competitor adapters. Minimalist, design-led, with a focus on material and fit.
must_not_do: Use static product shots without engineering detail
Imply affiliation with Swatch or Audemars Piguet

success_metric.secondary: Engagement rate (likes, comments, shares) and sentiment analysis (positive reactions to engineering precision)

brief_for_copy.script_goal: Highlight Cradle Adapter V1’s engineering precision (40.35mm, 0.7mm, 22mm) and contrast it with generic competitor adapters. End with a clear CTA to join the waitlist.
brief_for_copy.caption_goal: Reinforce the engineering precision and scarcity narrative. Include a direct comparison to competitors and a clear CTA to pre-order.
brief_for_copy.cta_language: Pre-Order Now — limited early access before competitors flood the market.
proof_points_to_include: Designed for Royal Pop, not a generic strap
